title: ShareToken
description: Gruper Distributed share token (grant). A cryptographically signed, granularly scoped, instantly revocable authorization allowing a grantee to dispatch tasks to specific agents within defined constraints. Revocation takes effect within one dispatch cycle — no grace period.

id.description: Primary key. UUID v4. Also the `jti` claim in the JWT token string.

agent_ids.description: One or more Agent.id values covered by this grant. All listed agents must be owned by created_by.

grantee_user_id.description: User.id of the recipient. Only this user may present this token.

created_by.description: User.id of the token owner (must own all agent_ids).

scopes.description: Permitted task scope categories. Tasks with tools or types outside this list are rejected before reaching the agent. Explicitly excludes execute_arbitrary, email_external, and other high-impact actions by default.

result_visibility.description: What the grantee sees of execution detail. full=all logs and tool calls; output_only=final output only (default and recommended for most grants); none=only task status, result fetched separately by owner.

expires_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC expiry. After this timestamp the token is invalid for new dispatches. Maximum 90 days from created_at.

revoked_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of revocation. Non-null means the token is revoked. The orchestrator stops dispatching immediately on revocation and signals any in-flight task to abort.

is_active.description: Derived field: true if revoked_at is null AND expires_at is in the future. Stored for efficient query without recomputing on every dispatch.

token_string.description: Compact JWT string for grantee import. Returned only at mint time; not re-derivable from the database record. Null after the initial mint response.

import_count.description: Number of times this token has been imported by the grantee. Informational only.

last_used_at.description: Timestamp of the most recent successful dispatch under this token.

TokenQuotas.description: Per-grantee resource quotas enforced at enqueue time. Hard limits — not soft suggestions.

max_concurrent_tasks.description: Maximum tasks simultaneously in running or dispatched state under this grant.

max_ram_gb_per_task.description: Maximum RAM the agent may allocate for a single task from this grantee. Enforced via cgroup limits.

max_wall_time_s.description: Maximum wall-clock execution time per task (seconds). Overrides the task's own timeout_s if lower.

max_tasks_total.description: Lifetime task count limit for this token. Null = unlimited. Token is auto-revoked when reached.

TokenConditions.description: Non-quota constraints on when and how this token may be used.

time_windows.description: Grantee tasks are only accepted within these time windows (owner's local time). Empty array = no time restriction.

allowed_data_classes.description: Maximum data classification the grantee may submit. Confidential tasks require explicit grant.

jurisdiction_require.description: If set, tasks from this grantee are only dispatched to agents whose jurisdiction matches this value. Applies even to owned agents in the grant if they are in non-matching jurisdictions.

require_approval_tools.description: Tools that require explicit operator approval before the agent may invoke them under this grant. Empty = no additional approval gates beyond global policy.
